prompt: Create a computer graphics visualization resembling semantic segmentation. Generate a street scene with a person and cars, inspired by the reference image's composition, showing distinct objects and classes with clear color mapping.
prompt_refined: Generate a semantic segmentation image of a street scene, precisely replicating the composition and object placement from image 1. The image should feature a person running prominently in the foreground from left to right, a large dark SUV positioned centrally behind the person, and a smaller purple car further in the background to the right. Include distinct environmental elements such as the road, sidewalk, a building on the left, and background foliage. Each identifiable object and class (person, large car, small car, road, sidewalk, building, tree/foliage) must be represented by a unique, flat, and clearly distinguishable color for semantic mapping.
objects: A person running prominently in the foreground from left to right
A large dark SUV positioned centrally behind the person
A smaller purple car further in the background to the right
